ValidationRule.description: Only System Administrators can change a Company to or from Tier 0
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND ( OR( ISPICKVAL(Client_Tier__c,"Titanium (Tier 0)"), AND( ISCHANGED(Client_Tier__c), ISPICKVAL(PRIORVALUE(Client_Tier__c),"Titanium (Tier 0)") ) ), NOT(OR($User.ProfileId = '00e58000000s3v6', $User.ProfileId ='00e58000000z6UE', $User.ProfileId ='00e1i000000UWR0')), NOT($User.BypassValidationRules__c) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Only System Administrators can change a Company TO or FROM Tier 0. Please contact a System Admin for this update.
